title: rootless: fix segfault when open fd >= FD_SETSIZE
body:
if there are more than FD_SETSIZE open fds passed down to the Podman process, the initialization code could crash as it attempts to store them into a fd_set.  Use an array of fd_set structs, each of them holding only FD_SETSIZE file descriptors.

Signed-off-by: Giuseppe Scrivano <gscrivan@redhat.com>
